data.content:
Implemented the conversation-log pulldown formatting update on branch feat/foolery-284e-clean.

Changes:
- Added conversationNumber to interaction picker items so pulldown entries have a single explicit conversation identifier.
- Updated pulldown entry rendering to show `Conversation #n · <prompt source>` and a date+time timestamp.
- Added focused formatter tests for the pulldown surface.
- Split the lease-audit leaderboard test describe block so lint passes under max-lines-per-function.

Validation:
- `bun run lint` (passes with one existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx from react-hooks/incompatible-library)
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run test`
- `bun run build`
